name: Parsleyed Baby Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling water, cook the carrots for 6 minutes, until crisp-tender.
2. Drain the carrots and refresh under cold running water.
- The carrots can be prepared up to this point and stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to one day.
3. To serve, melt the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Stir in the sugar, salt, and hot-red-pepper sauce until melted.
5. Add the carrots to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes, or until heated through and the sugar is dissolved.
6. Stir in the minced parsley before serving.
- Makes 8 servings.
